'''rangocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miaphysite|miaphysite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miaphysite|miaphysite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rangocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rængecheth|rængecheth]] || [[word:rængechej|rængechej]] || [[word:rængechesh|rængechesh]] || [[word:rængeche|rængeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangongochoth|rangongochoth]] || [[word:rangongochoj|rangongochoj]] || [[word:rangongochosh|rangongochosh]] || [[word:rangongocho|rangongocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangochoth|rangochoth]] || [[word:rangochoj|rangochoj]] || [[word:rangochosh|rangochosh]] || [[word:rangocho|rangocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangofchoth|rangofchoth]] || [[word:rangofchoj|rangofchoj]] || [[word:rangofchosh|rangofchosh]] || [[word:rangofchof|rangofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rangochotho|rangochotho]] || [[word:rangochojo|rangochojo]] || [[word:rangochosho|rangochosho]] || [[word:rangochoko|rangochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rangochoth|rangochoth]] || [[word:rangochoj|rangochoj]] || [[word:rangochosh|rangochosh]] || [[word:rangocho|rangocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rangochothol|rangochothol]] || [[word:rangochojol|rangochojol]] || [[word:rangochoshol|rangochoshol]] || [[word:rangochokol|rangochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rangochothotho|rangochothotho]] || [[word:rangochojojo|rangochojojo]] || [[word:rangochoshosho|rangochoshosho]] || [[word:rangochoko|rangochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rangochothon|rangochothon]] || [[word:rangochojon|rangochojon]] || [[word:rangochoshon|rangochoshon]] || [[word:rangochokon|rangochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rangochothoro|rangochothoro]] || [[word:rangochojoro|rangochojoro]] || [[word:rangochoshoro|rangochoshoro]] || [[word:rangochokoro|rangochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
